# provider-keycloak llms.txt
# See: https://llmstxt.org/

> Provider Keycloak is a Crossplane provider for managing Keycloak resources as Kubernetes custom resources.

## Docs

- [Installation](https://crossplane-contrib.github.io/provider-keycloak/docs/using/getting-started/installation): Install the provider into Crossplane
- [Configuration](https://crossplane-contrib.github.io/provider-keycloak/docs/using/getting-started/configuration): Connect to Keycloak
- [First Realm](https://crossplane-contrib.github.io/provider-keycloak/docs/using/getting-started/first-realm): Create your first realm
- [Realms](https://crossplane-contrib.github.io/provider-keycloak/docs/using/resources/realms): Realm resource reference
- [Clients](https://crossplane-contrib.github.io/provider-keycloak/docs/using/resources/clients): OIDC client resource reference
- [Users](https://crossplane-contrib.github.io/provider-keycloak/docs/using/resources/users): User resource reference
- [Roles](https://crossplane-contrib.github.io/provider-keycloak/docs/using/resources/roles): Role resource reference
- [Groups](https://crossplane-contrib.github.io/provider-keycloak/docs/using/resources/groups): Group resource reference
- [Protocol Mappers](https://crossplane-contrib.github.io/provider-keycloak/docs/using/resources/protocol-mappers): Token claim mappers
- [Identity Providers](https://crossplane-contrib.github.io/provider-keycloak/docs/using/resources/identity-providers): External IdP federation
- [User Federation](https://crossplane-contrib.github.io/provider-keycloak/docs/using/resources/user-federation): LDAP/AD integration
- [ProviderConfig](https://crossplane-contrib.github.io/provider-keycloak/docs/using/reference/provider-config): ProviderConfig reference
- [Credentials](https://crossplane-contrib.github.io/provider-keycloak/docs/using/reference/credentials): Credential fields reference
- [Troubleshooting](https://crossplane-contrib.github.io/provider-keycloak/docs/using/reference/troubleshooting): Common issues and fixes
